mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market deterioration signals impending corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >65% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand strength, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive returns with >55% accuracy over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week during expansionary phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 5-day returns during expansionary phases, with a win rate below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects sustained aggregate demand expansion, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth correlates with negative 60-day forward returns in >60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 215.0, persistent inflationary pressure forces expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL readings above 215.0 are followed by positive 20-day returns in >70% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor market absorption, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS and UNRATE signal yields a positive return win rate below 50% over a 10-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts signal weakening residential investment and reduced construction sector activity, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter during late-cycle phases.
failure_condition: Negative HOUST growth fails to predict negative 60-day returns with >55% accuracy during late-cycle periods.
